title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Soft Bath Towel Set | 2 Pieces Egyptian Cotton Bathroom Towel | 700 GSM Hotel Collection Towels | Water Absorbent Towels Sets, Teal, 70X125
features: 700 GSM BATH TOWELS: These bath towels are extra large, and are made of 100% ringspun cotton. The size of the luxury bath towels is 70x125 cm. Such beautiful soft bath towels will give a unique look to your bathroom.

FAST DRY TOWELS: Very super egyptian cotton bath towels have a huge quality to absorb ample water. The texture of these extra large bath towels is very even and smooth. 100% cotton makes them thick bath towels.

QUICK ABSORB AND USAGE: The cozy bath towel is used to dry off your hair and cover your head fully. A very cozy touch will dry your body and keep you warm. The bath towel Egyptian cotton, can be used in the gym during workouts.

FREE FROM HARSH CHEMICALS: As we know that some towels create allergic problems, but the teal bath towels are free from chemicals. You can use them on your face without hesitation. The outer layer of ringspun bath towels is smooth and even.

WASHABLE TOWELS: This bath towel is machine washable. Wash dark-colored towels separately. Don’t use iron on the jumbo bath sheet. No hard chemicals should be used during the wash of the extra thick towel.
